thought.text:
All cases have weight 1.0 by default. Score formula: `sqrt(answer_time / output_time) * 100`. The classic baseline gets 35.16 average. We can dramatically improve via more aggressive optimization passes.

Let me focus on the biggest wins. Look at `instruction-combining` (2.16) and `const-propagation` (3.79) which would benefit most from constant folding/instcombine:
